duckdb.notes: DuckDB 1.5.4 is the latest published non-LTS release. Newer branch commits are candidate evidence, not runtime inputs.

ducklake.notes: DuckLake publishes through DuckDB-versioned extension branches rather than GitHub Releases; the selected commit is the current 1.5 branch tip.

spatial.notes: The newer 1.5 branch tip targets unreleased DuckDB commit bd77d596392f567d1d8cc18d45874c78b145d3d3; the selected source and signed artifact target released DuckDB 1.5.4 exactly.

capability_reviews.upstream_evidence: The selected 1.5 tip and current main expose ducklake_table_info but no public ducklake_column_info or equivalent top-level committed-column identity function.
capability_reviews.deletion_gate: Delete the patch when a release-matched public API passes the complete identity lifecycle and package gates.

capability_reviews.upstream_evidence: The selected release-matched Spatial source already contains CRS-parameterized GEOMETRY, ST_CRS/ST_SetCRS guidance, ST_Transform propagation, and mismatch tests.
capability_reviews.deletion_gate: S0 must qualify and project upstream behavior before considering any local native implementation.

capability_reviews.local_implementation: maintained WKB bbox columns and conservative exact-recheck rewrite
capability_reviews.upstream_evidence: DuckDB 1.5.4 native geometry Parquet statistics already pass M4 comparisons; newer unreleased Spatial 1.5 commits add R-tree scan, filtering, parallel fetch, CRS, and spatial-join improvements.
capability_reviews.deletion_gate: At every release-matched candidate, rerun the M4 write/client/exact-plan matrix and delete local bbox machinery when upstream satisfies the same gates.

capability_reviews.upstream_evidence: Official DuckLake remains the only selected create/write/snapshot/compaction implementation.
capability_reviews.deletion_gate: Do not add a private writer; use a released hook or narrowly reviewed patch only for a proven requirement.

patch_reviews.reason: No public release-matched or main-branch column identity API currently satisfies the catalog lifecycle requirement.
patch_reviews.deletion_gate: Recheck before every bundle update and delete on upstream equivalence.
